title: ricinella pedunculosa
intro: Ricinella pedunculosa, also known as Ricinelle or Ricinelle Pedunculée, is a plant species native to the Mediterranean region, particularly in Spain and France. It belongs to the Asphodelaceae family and is commonly known for its medicinal properties. The plant contains a saponin called ricinoleic acid, which has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, providing health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, and improving cardiovascular health. Ricinella pedunculosa is traditionally used to prepare herbal remedies, including extracts, infusions, and topical applications, to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and digestive issues.
